title: Operational audit-chain WORM verification

tuw_evidence.title: Verify legal-hold purge block, in-place mutation detection, and assemble evidence

commands.command: jq -r '.work_packages[] | select(.wp_id=="LT-L2-W01" or .wp_id=="LT-L3-W04" or .wp_id=="LT-L3-W06" or .wp_id=="LT-L5-W01") | [.wp_id,.evidence.command_status,.evidence.classification] | @tsv' docs/launch/launch-tuw-status-audit.json
commands.purpose: Verify W05 predecessor state before claiming blocked evidence.

commands.command: for p in tests/launch/security-acceptance/audit-chain tests/launch/security-acceptance/audit-worm-mutation docs/launch/security-acceptance/audit-chain-report.md docs/launch/security-acceptance/audit-worm-mutation-report.md docs/launch/worm/audit-chain-verify-output.json docs/launch/worm/mutation-attempt-results.json; do if test -e "$p"; then printf 'present %s\n' "$p"; else printf 'absent %s\n' "$p"; fi; done
commands.purpose: Verify required W05 test suites and operational evidence artifacts are absent.

output_summary: Launch plan requires operational WORM hash-chain verification, legal-hold purge block, and in-place mutation attempt blocking.
critical-rp-saas-hardening-plan.md lists RP03 gates: no in-place mutation, correction event, hash-chain verification, legal-hold purge block, and permission-trimmed audit query.
commands.purpose: Verify W05 blocker survey aligns with policy source requirements.

commands.summary: TUW total 344, WP total 72, violations 0, PASS

blocked_claims: This record does not close LT-L5-W05.
This record does not access or verify a staging WORM operational store.
This record does not execute audit-chain verification.
This record does not execute legal-hold purge or in-place mutation attempts.
This record does not prove record counts, head hash, or mismatch count.
This record does not prove legal-hold purge block, correction events, or mutation detection.
This record does not access staging, production, real matters, or real HR-sensitive files.
This record does not satisfy G4 or L5-EXIT.
This record does not treat the user review waiver as valid review evidence.
